title: Building with ADK & A2A: How multi-agent collaboration designs a game
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Agent2Agent protocol (A2A) enable multi-agent collaboration on a game development task, with agents handling architecture, asset rendering, and project management under human-in-the-loop oversight. The demo shows practical agentic development using these tools on Cloud Run and Google Cloud infrastructure.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and the Agent2Agent protocol (A2A) support multi-agent collaboration on a game development task. Separate agents handle architecture, asset rendering, and project management, coordinating under human-in-the-loop oversight. The demo runs on Cloud Run and Google Cloud infrastructure, showing how ADK and A2A combine for agent orchestration in practice.
